parameters.content:
## The Reach Auto-Publisher V3

### Architecture: Claim-Based State Machine
The workflow uses `claim_publish_job` RPC for atomic job claiming.
This prevents duplicate publishes when multiple n8n instances run.

### Flow
```
Schedule (5min) -> Claim Job (RPC)
                    -> Has Job? -> Publish FB -> IG -> LI -> YT -> TT
                    -> No Job   -> Stop          -> Finalize -> Log -> Alert?
                                                    -> Loop back to Claim
```

### Environment Variables Required
```
SUPABASE_URL              - Supabase project URL
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY - Supabase service role key
META_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN    - Meta System User token (FB + IG)
FACEBOOK_PAGE_ID          - Facebook Page ID
INSTAGRAM_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID - IG Business Account ID
LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN     - LinkedIn OAuth2 token
LINKEDIN_ORG_URN          - urn:li:organization:XXXXX
YOUTUBE_ACCESS_TOKEN      - Google OAuth2 token
TIKTOK_ACCESS_TOKEN       - TikTok OAuth2 token
ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL         - (optional) Slack/Teams webhook
```

### Setup
1. Set all env vars in n8n Settings > Variables
2. Ensure Supabase migrations 0010-0014 are applied
3. Run Manual Test (dry_run mode, no live publishing)
4. Activate the schedule trigger

## Platform Support Matrix

| Platform | Content Types | API Version | Auth |
|----------|---------------|-------------|------|
| Facebook | Image, Video, Reel, Carousel | Graph v21.0 | Bearer token (header) |
| Instagram | Image, Video, Reel, Carousel | Graph v21.0 | Container/Poll/Publish |
| LinkedIn | Image, Video | REST /rest/posts | OAuth2 + Version header |
| YouTube | Video, Shorts | Data API v3 | OAuth2 resumable upload |
| TikTok | Video | Content Posting v2 | OAuth2 chunked upload |

### Key Changes from V2
- LinkedIn migrated from /v2/ugcPosts to /rest/posts
- All tokens in env vars, zero hardcoded secrets
- Instagram polling reduced from 150s to 60s max
- YouTube and TikTok nodes added
- Facebook uses Authorization header (not query string)
- Carousel support for FB multi-photo and IG mixed media

### Token Refresh Schedule
- Meta: System User token (never expires)
- LinkedIn: 60-day expiry, needs refresh workflow
- YouTube: Auto-refreshed by Google OAuth2
- TikTok: 24h access token, 365d refresh token

## Safety and Error Handling

### Claim-Based Locking
Job claimed with 120s expiry via FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED.
If worker crashes, job auto-releases after 120s.
No duplicate publishes across concurrent workers.

### Dry Run Mode
Manual Test trigger sets dry_run=true.
All publisher nodes skip API calls in dry_run.
Use to validate workflow logic without posting.

### Per-Platform Isolation
onError: continueRegularOutput on all publishers.
Facebook failing does NOT block Instagram.
Results accumulate in _results array.

### Status Machine
pending -> claimed -> [succeeded | partial | failed | dead]
- succeeded: all targeted platforms posted
- partial: some platforms posted, some failed
- failed: all targeted platforms failed -> dead letter
- dead: moved to dead_letter_jobs for manual review

### Failure Alerts
Send Alert node fires when any platform fails.
Configurable via ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL env var.
Supports Slack, Teams, or any webhook endpoint.

### Post Stage Update
post.stage only changes to 'posted' AFTER publish succeeds.
Never marks posted before actual API confirmation.
This is the key safety fix from V2.
